creator: rmacklem@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 256094
Commit 4c136aa (this patch) is needed for 14.1

This pacth (which is commit 4c136aa in stable/14)
is needed for 14.1. (It is in 14.2.)

I will see if it can be done as an errata, but you can
safely apply this one line patch and run a kernel
from sources, if you are comfortable doing so.
(I finally got around to setting up a 14.1 kernel
for testing.)
